description: REV16 §10: one canonical owner per sizing/commitment/stack fact after the full-history physical-chip replay consolidation. Every fact lists canonical_owner, approved_adapters, read_only_consumers, qa_checks, and remaining_active_producers — which MUST be []. stack_before and all_in_state each have EXACTLY one active production owner; build_decision_snapshot no longer co-produces them.

acceptance.note: Every Hero AND villain action row in the hand grid reads the canonical full-history per-action replay (replay_full_history / canonical_action_replay). No villain-row exemption remains. The only intentional duplicate is the INDEPENDENT QA oracle (oracle_full_replay), which imports none of the production replay.

physical_amount_added.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (physical_amount_added_bb — chips derived from the live level reached, never raw added_bb)

live_commitment.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (live_commitment_before_bb / live_commitment_after_bb — live posts + live actions, the dead ante excluded)

stack_before.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (stack_before_bb — starting - cumulative prior physical + uncalled returns)
read_only_consumers: build_decision_snapshot.hero_remaining (REV16: now CONSUMES the replay stack_before — no longer a co-producer)

stack_after.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (stack_after_bb — with uncalled refund for chip conservation; the Hero decision view exposes the at-action exhaustion (0 for all-in) + uncalled_return separately)

uncalled_return.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (uncalled_return_bb — the lone top live committer's excess over the 2nd-highest at street close)

all_in_state.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.replay_full_history (became_all_in — the ledger is_all_in flag OR a level/call that exhausts the stack, decided in ONE place)

forced_post_type.canonical_owner: gem_parser.normalize_hand (stamps post_type from raw text) -> gem_decision_snapshot.normalize_forced_posts (ONE typed normalizer)
approved_adapters: normalize_forced_posts order+position fallback for old cached ledgers

callable_amount.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.build_decision_snapshot (to_call from the replay faced_live - live_before; callable = min(callable_component, replay stack_before))

approved_adapters: PKO bounty-adjusted threshold derives FROM the canonical required equity

effective_decision_depth.canonical_owner: gem_decision_snapshot.build_decision_snapshot.canonical_effective_decision_depth_bb (eff basis now reads the replay stack_before)

frozen_for: REV17 Stage P (the mandatory tracked ownership contract; must be in the clean source bundle + verify_release)
